name: wxcode/admin-cargo-fleet
title: Cargo Fleet Admin
description: Industrial-clean logistics admin for fleet & shipment operations — left hub/region sidebar, topbar with region filter, 4 KPI cards (in-transit / on-time rate / active fleet / warehouse utilization), a Kanban-style shipment status board, an original abstract route/region SVG visualization, and a live active-shipments table. Orange-amber accent on white/slate canvas.

query.en: Build me an industrial-clean cargo fleet admin dashboard — left sidebar with hub/region switcher, topbar with search and region filter, 4 KPI cards (in transit, on-time rate, active fleet, warehouse utilization), a shipment status board (Pending / Loading / In Transit / Delivered), a route/region visualization, and an active shipments table.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me an industrial-clean cargo fleet admin dashboard — left sidebar with hub/region switcher, topbar with search and region filter, 4 KPI cards (in transit, on-time rate, active fleet, warehouse utilization), a shipment status board, a route visualization, and an active shipments table.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation
